log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster.
→ Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 12 necrotic damage (half).

══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 15

══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 6 ══

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Yuan-Ti — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 25 fire damage + .

══ ROUND 7 ══
